tt0499549.Title: Avatar
tt0499549.Plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

tt0120737.Title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
tt0120737.Plot: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

tt31193180.Title: Sinners
tt31193180.Plot: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

tt0245429.Title: Spirited Away
tt0245429.Plot: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.
